name: Natural Short Clips fMRI (Gallant Lab)
description: fMRI from 5 participants watching natural short video clips, shared on G-Node GIN. Used to build voxel-wise semantic models mapping how the brain represents object and action categories in continuous natural vision.
citation: Huth AG, et al. (2012). A continuous semantic space describes the representation of thousands of object and action categories across the human brain. Neuron, 76(6), 1210–1224.
